intro: Bergia arenarioides, also known as rock bergia, is a succulent plant species belonging to the family Malpighiaceae. Bergia arenarioides has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, offering health benefits such as anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which may aid in the treatment of various conditions including fever, diarrhea, and respiratory issues.
